entries.text:
Verses 1-38

CHAPTER 37

Hezekiah in the House of the Lord and Sennacherib’s Second Attempt

1. Hezekiah’s humiliation and Isaiah sent for (Isaiah 37:1-5) 2. The message from the prophet (Isaiah 37:6-7) 3. Rabshakeh’s letter (Isaiah 37:8-13) 4. Hezekiah’s prayer (Isaiah 37:14-20) 5. The prayer answered (Isaiah 37:21-35) 6. The army of Sennacherib judged (Isaiah 37:36) 7. The judgment upon Sennacherib (Isaiah 37:38)
